---
title: "Resume"
---

## Education
* **Bachelor of Arts and Sciences in Geology**, Minor in Data Science | [cite_start]William & Mary [cite: 7]
* [cite_start]**W&M Stofan Scholarship Recipient** [cite: 8]

## Technical Experience

### Geotechnical Engineering Intern 
* GET Solutions, Inc., a Terracon Company* | [cite_start]Summer 2024 [cite: 12, 13, 14]
* [cite_start]Conducted soil testing via hand auger and drilling operations[cite: 16].
* [cite_start]Performed field-level groundwater and environmental testing[cite: 17].
* [cite_start]Executed computational work related to geotechnical engineering[cite: 19].

### Honors Thesis Author
*William & Mary* | [cite_start]Expected May 2026 [cite: 21, 10]
* [cite_start]**Title:** "Potential causes of clustered knickpoints in the Appalachian Mountains"[cite: 21].
* [cite_start]Managing and manipulating large ( $>200k~km^{2}$ ) rasters and datasets[cite: 24, 25].

### Creator: Stream Analysis for Geoscientists
[cite_start]*PyCogs* [cite: 27, 28]
* [cite_start]Developed an educational resource using Jupyter Notebooks for geoscientists learning Python[cite: 29, 30].

## Skills
| Category | Skills |
|----------|--------|
| **Software** | [cite_start]Python, ArcGIS, QGIS, gINT, C, Objective C, VSCode [cite: 35] |
| **Python** | [cite_start]Matplotlib, Seaborn, Pandas, GeoPandas, NumPy, SciKit-Learn [cite: 35] |
| **Analysis** | [cite_start]Raster analysis, vector geometry manipulation, statistical tests [cite: 35] |
| **Field/Lab** | [cite_start]Proctor testing, CBR testing, soil core analysis, VOC testing [cite: 35] |
